name: Sarah L.
text: Best chicken chop in Setapak, hands down! The ambiance is so cozy — my go-to spot for weekend brunch with friends. Staff are super friendly too.

name: Ahmad R.
text: Finally a cafe in Setapak that gets it right. Delicious, and actually affordable. The Oreo waffle is unreal. Brought my family here twice this month.

name: Michelle T.
text: The interior is gorgeous — perfect for photos! Had the creamy carbonara and burnt cheesecake. Both were 10/10. Will definitely be back for more.
